practice.name: Problem 19 (2023 AMC 8)
practice.statement: An equilateral triangle is placed inside a larger equilateral triangle so that the region between them can be divided into three congruent trapezoids. The side length of the inner triangle is half the side length of the larger triangle. What is the ratio of the area of one trapezoid to the area of the inner triangle?

practice.name: Problem 20 (2024 AMC 8)
practice.statement: Any three vertices of a cube can be connected to form a triangle. How many of these triangles are equilateral and contain a given vertex as one of their vertices?

practice.name: Problem 9 (2005 AMC 8)
practice.statement: In quadrilateral $ABCD$, sides $\overline{AB}$ and $\overline{BC}$ both have length $10$, sides $\overline{CD}$ and $\overline{DA}$ both have length $17$, and the measure of angle $ADC$ is $60^{\circ}$. What is the length of diagonal $AC$? [See figure in original PDF]

practice.name: Problem 6 (2015 AMC 8)
practice.statement: In $\triangle ABC$, $AB=BC=29$ and $AC=42$. What is the area of $\triangle ABC$?
